records.naics_desc: SEARCH, DETECTION, NAVIGATION, GUIDANCE, AERONAUTICAL, AND NAUTICAL SYSTEM AND INSTRUMENT MANUFACTURING
records.description: AIRBORNE MINE COUNTERMEASURES (AMCM) SYSTEMS DEPOT MAINTENANCE SUPPORT FOR AN/AQS-24 SONAR DETECTING SET (ALL VARIANTS), COMMON POST MISSION ANALYSIS (CPMA), AND INTERMEDIATE LEVEL TEST EQUIPMENT (ILTE).
THIS COVERS SYSTEMS ENGINEERING TECHNICAL SUPPORT TO CONDUCT ONSITE MAINTENANCE AND TRAINING ON THE NAVIKNOT 450 SONAR SYSTEMS ONBOARD J-AOS SHIPS.
